prediction.reasoning: Without historical data or specific ETN context, I've applied a general equity volatility model assuming ~20% annual volatility. Ranges reflect approximately ±4.2% (50%), ±7.4% (80%), and ±9.2% (90%) movements based on standard normal distributions scaled for the time horizon.
